title: PR 102 graph decision-complete closeout planned
body: Owner direction after PR #102 technical closeout: do not merge until graph plans are finalised and decision-complete. Fronded Branching Grove added a current final-session plan for pre-merge graph decision-completeness: refresh PR evidence, absorb topology findings into graph-stack + ADR-173, absorb four slice-plan findings, owner-resolve the EEF t19 contradiction, sweep open questions, and record an explicit decision-complete verdict.
